summary: Iteration 179 testing complete: Chinese Language, Expanded Mantras (73+), Cinematic Intro Updates. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: Chinese (中文) language option in Settings with 8 total languages, selecting Chinese changes UI text to Chinese translations (设置), cinematic intro shows gameplay showcase cards at each level (3 cards per level), Level 1 shows Rock Hounding/RPG Battles/Daily Quests, Level 5 shows God Mode/Genesis Mint/Gate of Source, skip button/level dots/CTA button all present, existing routes (dashboard, trade-circle, hotspots) still working.
critical_code_review_comments: content.py MANTRA_LIBRARY expanded to 96 mantras (exceeds 73+ requirement)
New categories added: chinese (15 Daoist/Buddhist mantras with lang:zh), gates (4 mantras), explore (4 mantras)
Chinese mantras include proper lang:zh field for language identification
LanguageContext.js properly implements 8 languages including Chinese (zh) with full UI translations
CinematicIntro.js FeatureShowcase component renders 3 gameplay cards per level with icons and descriptions
Level showcase cards have proper animations (delay, scale, opacity transitions)
Cinematic intro maintains skip button, level dots navigation, and CTA button functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 179 Chinese Language, Expanded Mantras, Cinematic Intro all working. Mantra library now has 96 entries with 17 categories including chinese (15), gates (4), explore (4). Chinese language selector in Settings shows 8 languages, selecting Chinese changes UI text (e.g., Settings becomes 设置). Cinematic intro at /intro route shows 5 levels with 3 gameplay showcase cards each - Level 1: Rock Hounding, RPG Battles, Daily Quests; Level 5: God Mode, Genesis Mint, Gate of Source. All existing routes (dashboard, trade-circle, hotspots) still working.

backend_apis.GET /api/mantras/all: Returns 96 mantras with 17 categories including chinese, gates, explore
backend_apis.GET /api/mantras?category=chinese: Returns Chinese mantras with lang:zh field (15 total)

frontend_chinese_language.settings_page: 8 languages displayed: English, Chinese, Spanish, French, Hindi, Japanese, Arabic, Portuguese
frontend_chinese_language.chinese_option: ZH flag with 中文 native label
frontend_chinese_language.language_change: Selecting Chinese changes UI text (Settings → 设置)
frontend_chinese_language.persistence: Language stored in localStorage as cosmic_lang

frontend_cinematic_intro.animations: FeatureShowcase cards animate in with delay and scale transitions
